name: Syntra
long_description: Syntra is a medical data analytics platform that turns messy clinical documentation into real-time, actionable insights for billing, compliance, and care quality. We help clinics generate more revenue per clinical encounter while reducing up to 60% of administrative overhead. Syntra supports hundreds of specialty practices nationwide and processes $100Ms in medical claim charges annually.
one_liner: Agentic infrastructure for specialty medical practices.
